groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #9.

sentences.text: CO2 injection at two bubbles per second promotes vigorous plant growth in a high-tech planted tank.

CO2 injection at two bubbles per second promotes vigorous plant growth in a high-tech planted tank. Activated carbon should be replaced monthly to maintain effective chemical filtration in any marine tank.
